productDisplayName: Inkfruit Men's Mementos Of A Travel Purple T-shirt
description: CompositionPurple round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a purple fabric tape on the inseam of the necklne and graphic print with lettering on the front FittingComfortWash care Hand wash separately in cool water at 30 degrees Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean If you are a globe trotter and love to collect souvenirs from every place you visit, then this purple tee from inkfruit is perfect for you. In an attractive color with images of famous structures like the Eiffel Tower, Taj Mahal, Big Ben, Leaning Tower of Pisa, Statue of liberty and more, you are bound to get a lot of attention from every one. Pair this tee with jeans or shorts and flaunt your love for travel.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
